results.title: Shiva Chandrasekaran, MD FACP - Lumeris | LinkedIn
results.snippet: March 10, 2026 - We were clearly vibing with Centers for Medicare & Medicaid Services yesterday, as we released this great blog by my Premier Inc. colleague, Somaieh McMullan, PhD that outlines policy recommendations for better engaging specialists in VBC. This is a critical policy need, as specialists are the missing link in value-based care — and CMS is starting to close the gap. While ~77% of primary care physicians participate in MSSP ACOs, specialists remain 40–50% less likely to engage in value-based payment models.
